title: Gemma Playground: AI Edge Gallery
summary: Ian Ballantyne demonstrates Gemma running on Pixel phones via the Google AI Edge Gallery app. The app enables on-device multimodal tasks including image understanding, audio transcription, agent routing, and object recognition without internet connectivity.
writeup: Ian Ballantyne demonstrates Gemma running on Pixel phones through the Google AI Edge Gallery app. The walkthrough covers on-device multimodal tasks including image understanding, audio transcription, agent routing, and object recognition, all executed without internet connectivity. It matters because it shows these capabilities operating locally rather than relying on a network connection, with related concepts spanning smart routing and JSON Schema generation.
